name: freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, overdue payments cause cash flow gaps. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of invoices and payment reminders.
problem_solved: Overdue payments leading to cash flow gaps.
